titleStmt.title: SII 9.248: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 248. (A.R. No. 264 of 1918.) ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE RAMALINGESVARA TEMPLE AT ALABURU, SAME TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated the 10th year of the Chāḷukya king Jagadēkamalladēva (II), Prabhava, Pushya, śu. 1, Bṛihaspativāra, Uttarāyaṇa-saṅkrānti corresponding to A.D. 1147 December 25 Thursday. It states that, while Jagadēkamalla-Pāṇḍyadēva was ruling over Noḷambavāḍi thirtytwo-thousand and Nāchidēvarasa over Kōgaḷi five-hundred, the Mahājanas of Ālambūru, noted for their Vedic study and rites and their warlike sprit, (śaraṇāgata-vajra-pañjara) made a gift of land for the service of the god Svayambhu-Mūlasthānadēva and for the maintenance of the guru. The gift was made after washing the feet of Vāmadēva-Paṇḍita of Sōge.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē trailōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya
śaṁbhavē .
svasti . samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramē
svara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī
matu pratāpacakravartti jagadēkamalladēvara vijayarājyamuttarō
ttarābhivriddhipravarddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire kalyāṇa
purada nelevīḍinoḷsukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttiralu
tatpādapadmōpajīvi samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvaraṁ
kāṁcīpuravarādhīsvaraṁ yaduvaṁśāṁbaradyumaṇi subhaṭacūḍāma
ṇi nijakuḷakamaḷamārttaṁḍa paricchēdigaṁḍaṁ rājigacōḷamanōbhaṁgaṁ śrīma
tpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallapādābjabhriṁga nāmādiprasastisahi
taṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvaraṁ pratāpajagadēkamallapāṁḍyadēvaru noṇaṁ
bavāḍi mūvattircchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahaśiṣṭapratipāḷanadiṁ sukha
dināḷuttamire . svasti samastaprasastisahitaṁ śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēsvara nācidēvarasaru
kōgaḷiyaynūṟa maṁneyamanēkādhiṣṭitaṁ sukhadināḷuttamire svasti yamaniyamasvādhyā
yadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭānaparāyaṇa japasamādhiśīlaguṇaviśēṣōnnataruṁ vēdādhya
yanamukharamukha(ra)ruṁ jyōtiṣṭōmādyadhvarakriyānirataru satyapratiṣṭitaruṁ nu
ḍidumattennaruṁ śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararumappa śrīmajjanamējayadattiya mahā
grahāraṁvālaṁbūra vūraḍeyapramukhamahājanaṁgaḷeṁbhattanālvaruvēkastarāgirddu śrīma
tpratāpacakravartti jagadēkamallavarṣada 10 neya prabhavasaṁvatsarada pauṣya suddha 3 bṛhaspa
tivāradaṁduttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti vyatīpātanimittavāgi śrīsvayaṁbhumūlasthānadēva
ra pūjenivēdyakkaṁ gurugaḷaśanācchādanakkaṁ sōgeya kaḷēśvarapaṁḍitadēvara śiṣya vāmadē
vapaṁḍitara kālaṁ karcci dhārāpūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭaru Ūriṁ paḍuvaliṟuheganabāgiṁ baḍagalu
kōgaḷigaḍiṁbadalutkriṣṭavappereya keyi puttaru 6 kamma 800 hiriyakeṟeya keḷage bāgu
ḷiya baṭṭeyiṁ teṁkalā gaḍiṁbadalu koṭṭa gardde kamma 200 yā dēvariṁ mūḍa hūdōṁṭakke
mogekamma 400 vūroḷage gurugaḷigiralu prakaḷitavappa mane 1 yintinitumaṁ
sarvvābhādhaparihāravāgi biṭṭaru . yī dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisidavargge vāraṇāsi kuru
kṣētra prayāgeyargghyatīrtthameṁba puṇyasthānadoḷu sāyira kavilegaḷaṁ kōḍuṁ koḷagumaṁ
ponnoḷaṁ paṁcaratnadoḷaṁ kaṭṭisi sāsira caturvvēdapāragarappa brāhmaṇargge sāsira tapōdha
narggaṁ koṭṭa phaḷavakku yī dharmmamanaḷidāta vāraṇāsi (kuru) kurukṣētra pra
yāgeyargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷeṁba puṇyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāyira kavileyuṁ sāyira vēdapāraga
rappa brāhmaṇarumaṁ sāyira tapōdhanarumanaḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakku . svadattaṁ
paradattaṁ vā yō haratē vasundharāṁ . ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahaśrāṇi miṣṭāyāṁ jāyatē krimiḥ .
naiviṣaṁ viṣamityāhurdēvasvaṁ viṣamucyatē . viṣamēkākinaṁ hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 9.248 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
